title: News in Brief Podcast | Week 27 2026 | Air forwarder liability and Maersk optimism
summary:
This week on the News in Brief podcast, we unpack one of the biggest changes to air freight liability in decades, as new IATA direct air waybill rules shift greater responsibility onto freight forwarders – sparking a fierce dispute with FIATA and raising major concerns across the industry. 
We also examine Maersk’s dramatic upgrade to its earnings forecast and what it reveals about today’s container shipping market, from surcharges and soaring freight ...

title: The ‘data center crackdown’ is a logistics story – mostly unnoticed
summary:
Key takeaway: Moratoriums, lawsuits, and a federal standoff over xAI’s turbines are colliding with the single biggest driver of air cargo demand growth out of Asia. For forwarders, warehouse operators, and carriers, the consequences are becoming impossible to ignore.
The AI data center build-out has been treated by most logistics executives as a demand tailwind, a happy byproduct of Big Tech’s trillion-dollar arms race.
More GPU servers, more high-value freight out of ...
